title: schellolepis korthalsii
intro: Schellolepis korthalsii, also known as the Java fleabane, is a plant species native to Indonesia, particularly on the island of Java. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indonesian medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Schellolepis korthalsii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
